titleStmt.title: SII 25.194: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 194. (A.R. No. 194 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.

This record states that at the request of the chief Iḷaṅg[ō]yuḍaiyāṉ alias Maṉaiyadaraiyaṉ, the mahāsabhai made a grant of land as [tirunāmattukkāṇi]iṟaiyili in Śākkāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya of Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu in Rājēndrachōḷa-vaḷanāḍu. The name Śākkāṉam is probably a mistake for Śāttāṉam (i.e., Uśāttāṉam). Among the boundaries of the land, mention may be made of tachchar and kollar settlements (kuḍiyiruppu).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Aṟavo
laippaṭi §
tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ
śrīvikkirama coḻatevaṟku
yāṇṭu 5vatu Irācentiracoḻa
vaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampaināṭṭu pirama
tecam cākkāṉamāṉa keraḷakulācaṉica
ruppetimaṅkalattu nilattu Innā
yiṉār tevatāṉa Iṟaiiliyāka Iḷaṅkā
yuṭaiyār muṉaiyataraiyar viṇṇappañ
ceytu tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka vaicca
piṟittu Iṭuvi
tta vikkiramacoḻanallūr rūpāy 10 6kha9tim pura
variyār Iṭuvitta Innāyaṉārkku tirunāmattuk
kāṇi Ākak kācukoḷḷā Iṟaiyiliyāka cīkaraṇana
llūr Eṉṟu Iṭuvitta (2) rūpāy 2 veli Āka rūpāy 10 8kha
� Innilam patiṉeṭṭe Oṉpatu māvaraiyum muṉ
pu Uṭaiyār paḻampiyaraiyum tavirttu Innāyaṉār
tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka Iṭuvitta nilattukkup piṭinaṭa
ntu Ivvūr makācapai Aṟavolai ceyta pari
cāvatu . kiḻpāṟkke tiruva
ṭaiyāṉ maṉaikku ki ye teṟkku no
kki poy Aiyyaṉār kaṭaṅkuṭaiyāṉ koyilile
meṟku nokki poṉa Oḻukaiye meṟkku
nokkip poy taccar kollar kuṭiiruppil Uḷp
paṭṭa nilattil kiḻai Oḻukaiyile ceṉṟu
me Inta Oḻukaiye teṟku nokkip poy ki
ḻakku nokkip poy teṉmekku nokkippoy te
ṟku nokki kiṭaṅku Eṉ
kiḻakku nokkip poy teṟ
kku nokki kiṭaṅku Eṉkiṟa kuḷat
til teṉkaraiyile Uṟṟu
Ikkaraye meṟku nokkip
poy tarumivāykkāli niṉṟum kiṭaṅ(k) ke
viḻntavār vāykkālile Uṟṟu I
t tarumivāykkālāle teṟku nokkip
poy maturāntakap per Erikkey Uṟṟu Inta
Eriyiṉ vaṭakaraiye meṟku nokkip poy
vikkiramacoḻavayakkal melaivarampile Uṟ
ṟu Inta varampe vaṭakku nokkip poy varap
paṉ(c)ceyyil teṉvarampile Uṟṟu Inta
varampe meṟkku nokkip poy Icceyyil
melai varampile Uṟṟu Ivarampe vaṭakku
nokkip poy taṭṭāṉceyyile teṉvarampile
Uṟṟu Ivarampe meṟkku nokkippoy I
cceyyil melaivarampile Uṟṟu Ivarampile
vaṭakku nokkippoy meṭṭil kuṇṭilete
ṟkkil varampile Uṟṟu Ivvarampe meṟ
kku nokkippoy melaivarampile Uṟṟu I
v varampe vaṭakku nokkip poy vaṭakkil varampile
Uṟṟu Ivvarampe meṟkku nokkip poy pi
ḷḷaiyār vetavāraṇaviṭaṅkar nilattu kiḻaivarampe
vaṭakku nokkippoy kiḻāṅkaṇṇāṟṟile U
ṟṟu kiḻāṅkaṇṇāṟṟil niṉṟum vaṭakku nokki pi
ṇṭa nampicey Eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilattu vaṭa
meṟkku nokkip poy Aracavayakkal Eṉṟu per
kūvappaṭṭa nilattu melaivaram
pile Uṟṟu Inta varampe
vaṭakku nokkippoy kaṭukali
Āṟṟile Uṟṟu Iv Āṟe kiḻak
ku nokkip pontu melai Aḷḷumaṭai
kiḻvarampile Uṟṟu Ivarampe teṟ
ku nokkip pontu meṭṭuvaravaiyi
le Uṟṟu Ivvaravaiyile meṟkka
ṭaiya nilam Irumāvaraikkotta Aṟṟa vā
ṟe teṟkku nokkip pontakāmi ttu
niṉṟum meṟkku nokkippoṉa peruvaḻiyi
le Uṟṟu Ivvaḻiye meṟkku nokkip poIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 25.194 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
